content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Adjusted final-review amendment routing so only FixNow findings enter the restart queue while PlannedElsewhere stays on the mapping path and ProposeNewBead remains deferred for downstream bead creation. Tightened propose-new-bead duplicate suppression so only non-self open or in-progress title matches reclassify to planned-elsewhere, and added regressions covering the routing split plus closed/self duplicate cases.

## Steps

1. [Completed] Inspect the existing propose-new-bead implementation and final-review restart routing to isolate the two pending amendments without touching `.ralph-burning/` state.
2. [Completed] Update final-review routing in `src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs` to partition accepted amendments by explicit classification so only FixNow findings are enqueued for restart and PlannedElsewhere is the only mapping path.
3. [Completed] Update `src/contexts/milestone_record/service.rs` so defensive title rechecks ignore terminal beads and the active bead itself before reclassifying a propose-new-bead finding as planned-elsewhere.
4. [Completed] Add regression tests for classification-based routing and for closed/self duplicate matches continuing through new bead creation.
5. [Completed] Run `cargo fmt`, `cargo test`, `cargo clippy -- -D warnings`, and `cargo fmt --check` on the final tree.
6. [Skipped] Run the authoritative `nix build` gate.

## Validation Evidence

- `cargo fmt` completed successfully.
- `cargo test` completed successfully on the modified tree.
- `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` completed successfully.
- `cargo fmt --check` completed successfully.
- Targeted regressions passed for `handle_propose_new_bead_ignores_closed_duplicate_match` and `final_review_routes_only_fix_now_into_restart_queue`.
- `nix build` was started and entered the sandboxed release-test phase, but it produced no further output for an extended period and was interrupted before completion, so there is no passing result to report.

## Outstanding Risks

- Duplicate prevention still matches on normalized title only, so semantically duplicate follow-up work with different titles can still create separate beads.
- The authoritative `nix build` gate did not complete in this session; it was started, remained in a long-running sandboxed test phase with no further output, and was interrupted before a pass/fail result was produced.
